message:
feat(suggest): Integrate user preferences and rich explanations

- Filter hidden skills from suggestions and discovery
- Boost favorited skills by 0.25 in suggestion scoring
- Add ScorePercentageBreakdown for --explain flag output
- Show context/history/exploration/favorites percentages
- Update UserHistory with load/save/record_skill_load methods
- Add get_skill_usage_stats to database for history retrieval
- Persist user history across sessions in user_history.json

Closes: meta_skill-bgn9, meta_skill-7oal, meta_skill-nikk
Part of: Skill Recommendation Engine epic (meta_skill-3oyb)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
